parsed.production_notes: The video is clearly human-recorded, featuring real actors in a real setting. The camera work is simple and static, and the audio has the quality of an on-set recording, not a professional voiceover.

characters.appearance: A middle-aged Indian woman in her late 50s or early 60s with a medium build and a fair complexion. She has dark hair tied back neatly from her face, which has some visible wrinkles. Her expression is initially one of concern and suspicion.
characters.wardrobe: A light-colored salwar kameez with a blue and grey checkered pattern. She has a light beige dupatta with a pink floral print draped over one shoulder. She wears simple gold bangles on her left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Concerned, inquisitive, and slightly judgmental at the beginning.

characters.appearance: A young Indian woman in her late 20s or early 30s with a slim build and a fair complexion. She has long, dark hair and dark eyes. Her face is youthful and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: A white top under a magenta-colored dupatta (headscarf) draped over her head and shoulders. She wears black track pants with two white stripes down the side.
characters.demeanor: Initially defensive, then becomes earnest, articulate, and confident as she explains her actions and later addresses the audience.

scenes.setting: A living room, likely during the day. The characters are seated on a couch with a blue and white patterned cover. The wall behind them is dark brown with a subtle, swirling gold or beige pattern. A small, framed picture hangs on the wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium shot of two Indian women, Character A (older) and Character B (younger), sitting next to each other on a couch and having a conversation. Character A, on the left, looks at Character B with a questioning expression. Character B, on the right, looks back at her and gestures with her hands as she explains something. They are in a warmly lit indoor setting with a patterned brown wall behind them.

scenes.visual_description: A static, vertically-framed medium shot captures a conversation between an older woman (Character A) and a younger woman (Character B) on a couch. A prominent red banner with Hindi text is at the top of the frame. Animated subtitles in white boxes appear at the bottom, synchronized with the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: बहू मैंने देखा है तुम दिन भर इंग्लिश में किसी से बात करती रहती हो। कौन है वो? [Daughter-in-law, I have seen you talking to someone in English all day. Who is that?]

Character B says: अरे मम्मी जी, वो कोई और नहीं है। SpeakX का AI इंग्लिश टीचर है। वो मुझे इंग्लिश में कैसे बात करनी है, वो सिखाती है। मैं सोच रही हूं मैं भी कोई जॉब कर लूं, इसीलिए। [Oh mother-in-law, that's no one else. It's SpeakX's AI English teacher. It teaches me how to speak in English. I am thinking of getting a job, that's why.]

Character A says: क्यों? मेरे बेटे की कमाई से घर नहीं चल रहा क्या? [Why? Is my son's income not enough to run the house?]

Character B says: ऐसा नहीं है मम्मी। मैं पढ़ाई में बहुत तेज थी, लेकिन उसका कुछ कर नहीं पायी। अब शादी और बच्चे तो हो गए, तो मैंने सोचा कि मैं घर पे क्या करूंगी। अगर मैं भी कमाने लगी तो उनको भी मदद मिलेगी। और आज कल हर जॉब में इंग्लिश बोलना बहुत जरूरी है। इसी लिए SpeakX ऐप में प्रैक्टिस करती हूं। इसके AI इंग्लिश टीचर मुझे दिन में 10 मिनट बात करके 2 हफ्ते में फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश सिखा दी है। अब मुझे भी अच्छी कंपनीज ऑफर दे रही हैं, क्योंकि मैं कॉन्फिडेंट से फर्स्ट क्लास इंग्लिश बोल पाती हूं। [It's not like that, mummy. I was very good at studies, but I couldn't do anything with it. Now that I'm married and have children, I thought what will I do at home. If I also start earning, he will also get help. And nowadays, speaking English is very important for every job. That's why I practice on the SpeakX app. Its AI English teacher taught me fluent English in 2 weeks by talking to me for 10 minutes a day. Now even good companies are giving me offers, because I can speak first-class English with confidence.]
scenes.on_screen_text: जल्दी फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश सीखो घर बैठे जॉब पाओ (Jaldi farratedar English seekho ghar baithe job paao - Learn fluent English quickly, get a job from home)

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of Character B, who has turned to look directly at the viewer. She speaks with an earnest and persuasive expression, gesturing with her right hand, pointing her index finger up. Character A is still partially visible on the left side of the frame but is out of focus. The background and lighting remain the same.

scenes.visual_description: The shot focuses on Character B as she breaks the fourth wall and addresses the audience directly. The red banner at the top and the animated subtitles at the bottom continue to be displayed. She makes a direct call to action for the viewer.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: अगर आपको भी जॉब करना है और उसके लिए इंग्लिश सीखना है, तो अभी SpeakX ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [If you also want to get a job and need to learn English for it, then download the SpeakX app now.]
scenes.on_screen_text: जल्दी फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश सीखो घर बैठे जॉब पाओ (Jaldi farratedar English seekho ghar baithe job paao - Learn fluent English quickly, get a job from home)
